subject: Implement EvidenceHighlight React component with SHA256 span verification
description: Create apps/ui/src/components/EvidenceHighlight.tsx using byteOffsetsToStringRange; verify UTF-8 snippet SHA256 via crypto.subtle; highlight only when verified; show badges and RTL support.
activeForm: Created EvidenceHighlight.tsx with UTF-8 byte span verification via SHA-256 and RTL handling; lsp_diagnostics clean.
